chapter_title.en: Chapter on Rare Cases of Legal Punishments

text: 5138 - وَ رَوَى صَفْوَانُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْمَاضِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "أَصْحَابُ اَلْكَبَائِرِ كُلِّهَا إِذَا أُقِيمَ عَلَيْهِمُ اَلْحَدُّ مَرَّتَيْنِ قُتِلُوا فِي اَلثَّالِثَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5138 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Yunus from Abu Al-Hasan Al-Maḍi (as) who said:
"All those who commit major sins (kabaʾir), if the legal punishment (Hadd) is carried out on them twice, they are to be executed on the third offense."
